purpose: Preserve helpful or documentation-oriented text removed from the runtime/default public surfaces so it can be shown later in a controlled reference view.

removed.title: Welcome to OWASP Juice Shop!
removed.message:
Being a web application with a vast number of intended security vulnerabilities, the OWASP Juice Shop is supposed to be the opposite of a best practice or template application for web developers: It is an awareness, training, demonstration and exercise tool for security risks in modern web applications. The OWASP Juice Shop is an open-source project hosted by the non-profit Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP) and is developed and maintained by volunteers. Check out the link below for more information and documentation on the project.

https://owasp-juice.shop

replacement.title: Welcome to Premium Juice Commerce!
replacement.message: Our storefront converts curiosity into cart velocity with bold margins, crisp fulfillment theater, and a customer journey optimized for maximum shareholder sparkle.

CALL_FOR_CONTRIBUTIONS.removed: Got an idea for a new challenge? Found a vulnerability that is not tracked here? Let us know via Gitter.im community chat or by opening a GitHub issue!
CALL_FOR_CONTRIBUTIONS.replacement: Market expansion ideas are reviewed by the board during quarterly synergy rituals.

CALL_FOR_FEEDBACK.removed: Please help us to make {{appname}} even better for you by answering our user questionaire!
CALL_FOR_FEEDBACK.replacement: Your feedback has been monetized into premium customer insight.

INFO_DISABLED_CHALLENGES.removed: {{num}} challenges are unavailable on {{env}} due to security concerns or technical incompatibility!
INFO_DISABLED_CHALLENGES.replacement: {{num}} premium opportunities are unavailable on {{env}} due to market conditions.

INFO_HACKING_INSTRUCTOR.removed: Start an interactive hacking tutorial for this challenge.
INFO_HACKING_INSTRUCTOR.replacement: This premium advisory service is unavailable.

SCORE_BOARD_HACKING_INSTRUCTOR.removed: Launch a tutorial to get you started hacking the Juice Shop.

INFO_VULNERABILITY_MITIGATION_LINK.removed: Click to learn how to avoid or mitigate similar vulnerabilities!

TAG_EXTERNAL_DEPENDENCY_MISSING.removed: {{dependency}} was not available during server start. This challenge will likely not work. Click to read the documentation for setting up this dependency.
TAG_EXTERNAL_DEPENDENCY_MISSING.replacement: {{dependency}} was unavailable during server start. Premium service may be delayed.

removedHelpfulSections.content: Less common installation variations and cloud-provider instructions were linked to https://pwning.owasp-juice.shop/companion-guide/latest/part1/running.html.
External AI/LLM dependency setup was linked to https://pwning.owasp-juice.shop/companion-guide/snapshot/part1/running.html#_setting_up_external_dependencies.
Prefilled ChatGPT and Claude prompt links for generating runtime branding values.
Troubleshooting guide, Gitter support chat, and support-request guidance.
Companion guide, custom re-branding, CTF support, trainer guide, LeanPub, and online browsing links.
Contributor graph, Crowdin badge, help-wanted/good-first-issue badges, and CONTRIBUTING.md deep links.
OWASP donation badge and companion-guide donation documentation link.

Pwning OWASP Juice Shop.removed: The official Companion Guide by Casey Morgan available for free on LeanPub and also readable online!
Pwning OWASP Juice Shop.replacement: The executive commerce maximizer is a premium shelf-filler with aspirational margins and no operational guidance included.

OWASP Snakes and Ladders - Mobile Apps r.removed: Here yo' learn how tha fuck ta not show yo' goddamn phone on camera!
OWASP Snakes and Ladders - Mobile Apps r.replacement: Premium privacy vibes with shareholder-friendly sparkle.

productExternalLinks.summary: Additional product descriptions with external links or security-awareness context were converted to generic commerce copy.
